text.p: How is life, work, health and the entire family? Hope all is well. I got sister's text last week and I appreciate so much her labour of love. Hope your research is going on well. Glory be to God for his mercies.We are doing fine here. We are also trying our best to keep the Ministry going even though the burden of the work has been on a few of us who are making ourselves available. The Lord has been our strength. How is the Ministry in ? Greetings to brethren there. Greetings to and too. Be blessed.

How are you? how is my sister and bothers? Hope they are all fine. Glory be to God for his grace. How is your research work? Hope you are making good progress. I had tried severally to reach you in the last two weeks but the malfunctioning internet service and the epileptic power supply will not allow. The Lord will continue to help you. I handed over the money you gave me to the camp long ago but recently the president want to know whether the big one (over 90.000) is for our camp alone or we are going to share it with Central Camp. I told him it is meant for us but that I will still clarify from you. I remember that it was part of the money donated by the trustee and the Regional President which they want uds to use to open a Regional/State account. As things are now are will going to remit share or keep in a separate account. I shall be glad if we have more clarification on the matter ande as directed by the president.
How you are still thinking and working about my case. The good Lord will not forget you in Jesus mighty name.
How is life over there? Hope pleasurable. How is Sister and the chilrdren. Hope they are fine just to ask of you and ask after the family. You are blessed in the Lord.
Thanks for your love, concern and encouragement. I pray that the Lord will help you in your search for a host for me. We are doing fine to the glory of God. Greetings from my family members.
My very warm regards to everyone.
